tool.name: Terriamap
tool.command:
## FAIR-EASE data are from ## https://github.com/fair-ease/terria-config/blob/main/serverconfig.json ## https://github.com/fair-ease/terria-config/blob/main/wwwroot/init/fairease-main.json ## https://github.com/fair-ease/terria-config/blob/main/wwwroot/config.json
##if $config.config_select == 'own': ## cp '$config.config_json' /app/wwwroot/config.json && ##elif $config.config_select == 'fairease': ## cp '$__tool_directory__/fairease_config.json' /app/wwwroot/config.json && ##end if
#if $catalog.cotalog_select == 'own': cp '$catalog.catalog_json' /app/wwwroot/init/simple.json && #elif $catalog.cotalog_select == 'fairease': cp '$__tool_directory__/fairease_simple.json' /app/wwwroot/init/simple.json && #end if
##if $serverconfig.serverconfig_select == 'own': ## cp '$serverconfig.serverconfig_json' /app/serverconfig.json && ##elif $serverconfig.serverconfig_select == 'fairease': ## cp '$__tool_directory__/fairease_serverconfig.json' /app/serverconfig.json && ##end if
cd /app/ && node ./node_modules/terriajs-server/lib/app.js --config-file serverconfig.json
tool.help: Terria makes it easy to build advanced maps and digital twins, so you can see the bigger picture.
